subgoal.description: The goal gid to add as subgoal to a parent goal

insert_before.description: An id of a subgoal of this parent goal. The new subgoal will be added before the one specified here. `insert_before` and `insert_after` parameters cannot both be specified.

insert_after.description: An id of a subgoal of this parent goal. The new subgoal will be added after the one specified here. `insert_before` and `insert_after` parameters cannot both be specified.
